metadata.title: Caseta Marti i Carmeta | Holiday rental near Ebro Delta
metadata.description: Charming holiday rental with pool and garden in Terres de l'Ebre, close to the Ebro Delta. Perfect for nature and seaside getaways in Catalonia.

calendar.title: Availability calendar
calendar.lead: are not available; the rest can be requested. If you’re planning a long stay or have flexible dates, we recommend checking several weeks to find the best fit.

info.intro: In the following calendar you can easily check the availability of the house month by month.
info.intro2: Once you have your dates, you can contact us to confirm your reservation.
info.highSeasonText: July and August, as well as special periods such as Christmas and Easter.
info.additionalInfoText: The minimum stay is 3 nights. During high season, the minimum stay is 4 nights. Holidays and long weekends may have specific conditions depending on the calendar. For longer stays, feel free to contact us.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.lead:
Discover every area of the caseta: the porch for outdoor breakfasts, the pool for slow afternoons, bright bedrooms and comfortable shared spaces.

This holiday home is a great base to explore the Ebro Delta and enjoy a calm stay between nature, coastline and local food.

contact.title: Contact
contact.lead:
Want to book your stay? Get in touch and we will reply as soon as possible.

You can contact us by WhatsApp, phone or email.

We can also help with directions, local tips around the Ebro Delta and practical details for your trip.
contact.hint: Include dates and number of guests; we’ll get back to you soon.
contact.mapCaption: Map showing the area around the property.
